info.title: SlashMyBill ComputeOptimize Actions
info.description: Vendor-neutral compute optimization tools for the SlashMyBill Bedrock Agent. Provides compute instance inventory, rightsizing recommendations, spot instance candidates, and licensing analysis across all supported cloud providers.

post.summary: List compute instances with utilization metrics
post.description: Returns all compute instances for the connected account with instance type, state, region, and utilization metrics. Supports optional filters to narrow results by state, region, or instance type.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated key=value pairs to filter instances (e.g., state=running,region=us-east-1,instanceType=m5.large)

schema.description: Comma-separated key=value pairs to filter instances

200.description: Compute instances response with normalized instance data

post.description: Returns rightsizing recommendations for compute instances based on utilization metrics. Identifies over-provisioned and under-utilized instances with suggested target instance types and estimated savings.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Rightsizing recommendations response with suggested changes and savings estimates

post.description: Identifies compute instances that are good candidates for spot or preemptible pricing based on workload characteristics, interruption tolerance, and potential savings.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Spot candidates response with eligible instances and estimated savings

post.description: Analyzes software licensing costs and optimization opportunities for compute instances, including license-included vs bring-your-own-license comparisons and potential savings from license consolidation.

parameters.name: memberEmail
parameters.description: The member email address for account resolution

schema.description: The member email address for account resolution

200.description: Licensing analysis response with optimization opportunities and cost comparisons
